mapper.select:
select * from ( select t.activity_template as activityTemplate, t.activity_name as activityName,
IFNULL(s.bind_status,0) as bindStatus, IFNULL(b.activityNum, 0) + IFNULL(c.activityNum, 0) AS activityNum
0 as bindStatus, 0 as activityNum
from system_activity_template t
left join site_activity_template s on t.activity_template =s.activity_template and site_code =#{siteCode} left join (select activity_template,count(activity_template) as activityNum from site_activity_base where site_code= #{siteCode} and status =1 group by activity_template) b on t.activity_template=b.activity_template left join (select activity_template,count(activity_template) as activityNum from site_activity_base_v2 where site_code= #{siteCode} and status =1 group by activity_template) c on t.activity_template=c.activity_template
) as b

SELECT t.id AS id, t.activity_name AS activityName, t.activity_template as activityTemplate, t.updater AS updater, t.updated_time AS updatedTime, IFNULL(c.activityBindNum,0) as activityBindNum, count( base.id )+count( basev2.id ) AS activityNum FROM system_activity_template t left join ( select * from ( select activity_template,count(activity_template) as activityBindNum from site_activity_template where bind_status=1 group by activity_template ) b ) c on t.activity_template = c.activity_template LEFT JOIN site_activity_base base ON t.activity_template = base.activity_template AND base.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN site_activity_base_v2 basev2 ON t.activity_template = basev2.activity_template AND basev2.`status` = 1
GROUP BY t.id, t.activity_name, t.activity_template, t.updater, t.updated_time, c.activityBindNum
HAVING t.activity_template = #{vo.activityTemplate}
order by t.id asc

select * from ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.site_code AS siteCode, s.site_name AS siteName, IFNULL( temp.bind_status, 0 ) AS bindStatus, count( t.activity_template ) AS activityNum FROM site_activity_base t LEFT JOIN site_activity_template temp ON t.activity_template = temp.activity_template AND t.site_code = temp.site_code LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_code = t.site_code WHERE t.activity_template = #{vo.activityTemplate} AND t.STATUS = 1 GROUP BY t.site_code,t.activity_template,temp.bind_status,s.site_name ) b WHERE b.bindStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.site_code AS siteCode, s.site_name AS siteName, IFNULL( temp.bind_status, 0 ) AS bindStatus, count( t.activity_template ) AS activityNum FROM site_activity_base_v2 t LEFT JOIN site_activity_template temp ON t.activity_template = temp.activity_template AND t.site_code = temp.site_code LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_code = t.site_code WHERE t.activity_template = #{vo.activityTemplate} AND t.STATUS = 1 GROUP BY t.site_code,t.activity_template,temp.bind_status,s.site_name ) b WHERE b.bindStatus = 0 UNION ALL SELECT temp.site_code AS siteCode, s.site_name AS siteName, IFNULL( temp.bind_status, 0 ) AS bindStatus, count( t.activity_template ) + count( st.activity_template ) AS activityNum FROM site_activity_template temp LEFT JOIN site_info s ON s.site_code = temp.site_code LEFT JOIN site_activity_base t ON t.site_code = temp.site_code AND temp.activity_template = t.activity_template AND t.STATUS = 1 LEFT JOIN site_activity_base_v2 st ON st.site_code = temp.site_code AND temp.activity_template = st.activity_template AND st.STATUS = 1 WHERE temp.bind_status = 1 AND temp.activity_template = #{vo.activityTemplate} GROUP BY temp.site_code, temp.activity_template, temp.bind_status, s.site_name ) c order by c.activityNum desc, bindStatus desc
